suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Avoid assigning documentation-only features to `compiler-worker`, or explicitly exempt documentation-only tasks from its tests-first procedure and handoff expectations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `final-readme-refresh` feature was assigned `compiler-worker`, and both the original and follow-up worker handoffs had to explain that adding tests was not applicable because the task only changed README.md.
